no: Reflections of Destiny v0.9 by subtledoctor. 8 components spanning BG1/SoD/BG2. cn:100 FORBIDs EndlessBG1 cn:14, Imoen4Ever cn:10, and EET_end. cn:330 is EET-only. Conceptual conflicts with Transitions, Road to Discovery, AFH #2. Beta — not recommended for preset
sum: Major plot restructuring mod spanning BG1/SoD/BG2. Reshuffles content, rewrites Caelar backstory, adds SoD areas to BG2. Beta v0.9

ki.description: Quest involving Dauston can get stuck. The D5Daustonquest global variable may not advance properly, blocking progression.
ki.workaround: Use console: C:SetGlobal("D5Daustonquest","GLOBAL",13) to trigger the attack scene, or 15 to get the journal update for the next quest stage.

conflicts.reason: RoD cn:100 ('The Future is Now') has FORBID_COMPONENT for EndlessBG1 cn:14. Both mods restructure post-Sarevok BG1 content — cannot coexist. TP2-enforced incompatibility.

RoD cn:200 ('Rewriting History') rewrites the SoD Caelar backstory and narrative. Another Fine Hell also modifies the BG1-to-SoD transition. Users report dialogue inconsistencies when both installed. shaigan (G3, Feb 2026): 'I don't recommend mixing Reflections of Destiny with jastey's BG/SOD transition and SOD mods.'
conflicts.source: User report shaigan G3 topic 38225, Feb 2026

conflicts.reason: RoD cn:200 ('Rewriting History') and Road to Discovery both modify SoD narrative and transitions. Users report logical inconsistencies in dialogues when both installed.
conflicts.source: User report shaigan G3 topic 38225, Feb 2026
